dashboard.Wheneveramembersendsamessagetheygainaran: Whenever a member sends a message, they gain a random amount of XP (experience points) and trigger a short cooldown. When the cooldown finishes, they can gain more XP. Congratulations! You just learned how XP bots work.
dashboard.WhenenabledmemberswillbeabletogainXPThis: When enabled, members will be able to gain XP. This is the whole point of the bot.
dashboard.CustomizetheamountofXPearnedaswellashowo: Customize the amount of XP earned, as well as how often it can be gained. Easy enough.
dashboard.Amountisrandomlypickedbetweentheminandma: Amount is randomly picked between the min and max value
dashboard.Membersmustwaitthismanysecondsbeforethey: Members must wait this many seconds before they can gain XP again
dashboard.BygainingenoughXPmemberscanlevelupandear:
By gaining enough XP, members can level up and earn special roles or bragging rights.
                The amount of XP required scales with each level - early levels only need a couple thousand points but later levels need millions.
dashboard.Youcanadjustthelevelscalingtochangehowma:
You can adjust the level scaling to change how many more points are required with each level.
                A smaller curve makes it easier to level up and a larger curve makes it much more difficult.
dashboard.CubicfunctionthatdetermineshowmuchXPisne: Cubic function that determines how much XP is needed for each level
dashboard.RoundstherequiredXPtoanicernumbereg791XP: Rounds the required XP to a nicer number, e.g. 791 XP -> 800 XP
dashboard.BalancingishardHeressomepresetstopickfro: Balancing is hard. Here's some presets to pick from!
dashboard.Nosettingswillbechangeduntilyouclickappl: No settings will be changed until you click "apply"
dashboard.Automaticallygiverolestomemberswhentheyr: Automatically give roles to members when they reach certain levels. For free.
dashboard.ImagineifItriedtocapitalizeoffacoupleext: Imagine if I tried to capitalize off a couple extra lines of code, haha that would be absolutely crazy
dashboard.Removethisrolewhenahigherroleisobtained: Remove this role when a higher role is obtained
dashboard.AdvancedExcludethisrolewhensyncingroles: Advanced: Exclude this role when syncing roles
dashboard.Bydefaultthebotwillautomaticallysyncleve: By default, the bot will automatically sync level roles by adding missing ones and removing incorrect ones. Feel free to tweak this behaviour a little.
dashboard.Choosewhenthebotshouldautomaticallysyncl: Choose when the bot should automatically sync level roles
dashboard.Ifmembersshouldbeabletomanuallysynctheir: If members should be able to manually sync their roles whenever they want
dashboard.Displaysawarningmessageinrankifamembersr: Displays a warning message in /rank if a member's roles aren't synced properly
dashboard.Preventcertainrolesfrombeingreaddedorrem: Prevent certain roles from being re-added or removed when syncing.
dashboard.Sendanautomaticmessageinthechatwhenamemb: Send an automatic message in the chat when a member levels up. How fun!
dashboard.WhenenabledamessageorDMwillbesentwheneve: When enabled, a message or DM will be sent whenever anyone levels up.
dashboard.Themessagetosenduponlevellingup: The message to send upon levelling up.
dashboard.Theembeddedmessagetosenduponlevellingup: The embedded message to send upon levelling up.
dashboard.OpentheJSONdatabypressingJSONDataEditora: Open the JSON data by pressing 'JSON Data Editor' at the bottom of the site
dashboard.Copythetextandpasteitintheboxbelow: Copy the text and paste it in the box below
dashboard.InvalidembedJSONdataThisembedwillnotwork: Invalid embed JSON data! This embed will not work.
dashboard.Spiceupyourmessagewithdynamicvariables: Spice up your message with dynamic variables!
dashboard.Sendatestmessagetoseeifeverythingisworki: Send a test message to see if everything is working correctly
dashboard.ErrorsendingexampleAreyourDMsenabled: Error sending example! Are your DMs enabled?
dashboard.Whichchannelshouldthemessagebesentin: Which channel should the message be sent in?
dashboard.Sendafancyembedinsteadofanormalmessagead: Send a fancy embed instead of a normal message (advanced!)
dashboard.Howoftenthemessageshouldbesentegevery3rd: How often the message should be sent (e.g. every 3rd level)
dashboard.Levelupmessageswillonlysendwhenreachinga: Level up messages will only send when reaching a multiple of this number
dashboard.egamultipleof5willsendonlevels510152025: (e.g. a multiple of 5 will send on levels 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, ...)
dashboard.Onceamemberreachesthislevelthemultipleis: Once a member reaches this level, the multiple is no longer used and a level up message will be posted for every level (set to 0 to disable)
dashboard.Onlysendthelevelupmessagewhenobtainingan: Only send the level up message when obtaining a new reward role
dashboard.MakecertainroleschannelsgrantextraXPorno: Make certain roles/channels grant extra XP, or none at all.
dashboard.2xmultipliergrantsdoubleXP0xmultiplierdi: 2x multiplier grants double XP, 0x multiplier disables XP gain, etc
dashboard.MemberswithamultiplierrolewillhavetheirX: Members with a multiplier role will have their XP gain from messages multiplied by the value set below
dashboard.Ifamemberhasmultipleroleswhichoneshouldt: If a member has multiple roles, which one should take priority?
dashboard.0xmultiplierswillalwaysprioritizedregard: (0x multipliers will always prioritized regardless of this setting)
dashboard.Ifyouhave20xand30xrolemultiplierstheywil: If you have 2.0x and 3.0x role multipliers, they will be multiplied to 6.0x. Scales absurdly fast
dashboard.Categorymultiplierswillonlyapplytochanne: Category multipliers will only apply to channels that do not have a more specific multiplier set. Threads without a multiplier will default to their parent channel.
dashboard.Whatshouldbedoneifamemberalsohasamultipl: What should be done if a member also has a multiplier role?
dashboard.XPgainwillalwaysbeifeithermultiplieris0x: (XP gain will always be if either multiplier is 0x)
dashboard.Tweakthedetailsshownonrankcards: Tweak the details shown on rank cards.
dashboard.Somesettingsmayalsoapplytotheonlineleade: Some settings may also apply to the online leaderboard.
dashboard.AllowsmemberstochecktheirXPwithrankDisab: Allows members to check their XP with /rank. Disabling this will also hide most info in /calculate.
dashboard.Preventsmembersfromviewingtheamountoftim: Prevents members from viewing the amount of time until they can gain XP again.
dashboard.Preventsmembersfromviewingwhichroleshave: Prevents members from viewing which roles have multipliers. (except 0x)
dashboard.Forcesusagesofranktoalwaysbehiddenepheme: Forces usages of /rank to always be hidden (ephemeral), meaning that only the member who typed the command can see the message.
dashboard.Changesthenextlevelsectionofranktostarta: Changes the 'next level' section of /rank to start at 0 and only include XP from that level. e.g. If level 10 requires 2000 XP and level 11 requires 3000, it will display "500/1000 XP until level 11" for a member with 2500 XP.
dashboard.TweaksomeleaderboardrelatedsettingsGoodf: Tweak some leaderboard-related settings. Good for privacy.
dashboard.Allowsmemberstoviewandcomparetheirrankso: Allows members to view and compare their ranks on a big leaderboard.
dashboard.Forcesusagesoftoptoalwaysbehiddenephemer: Forces usages of /top to always be hidden (ephemeral).
dashboard.Disablesviewingthelistofrewardrolesthrou: Disables viewing the list of reward roles through the online leaderboard.
dashboard.Restrictstheleaderboardtomembersthathave: Restricts the leaderboard to members that have reached a certain level. Displays every server member if set to 0.
dashboard.OnlyallowviewingthetopXmembersontheleade: Only allow viewing the top X members on the leaderboard. Displays every server member if set to 0.
dashboard.Restrictstheonlineleaderboardsoonlymembe: Restricts the online leaderboard so only members of the server can access it.
dashboard.Settingsrelatedtotheserversdata: Settings related to the server's data.
dashboard.ExportseveryonesXPintoasinglefileonlycon: Exports everyone's XP into a single file (only contains user ID and XP)
dashboard.Downloadalldataifyouwishtoimportyoursett: Download all data if you wish to import your settings into an open-source fork of Polaris.
dashboard.DeleteeveryonesXPandstartfreshAllXPwillb: Delete everyone's XP and start fresh. All XP will be reset to 0, but reward roles will not be removed unless done manually.
dashboard.Restoresthedefaultsforallconfigurableset: Restores the defaults for all configurable settings such as the curve, reward roles, multipliers, level up message, etc. XP will not be cleared.
dashboard.Deletesthedataofeveryonewhohaslessthanac: Deletes the data of everyone who has less than a certain amount of XP. Might speed up load times.
dashboard.CopiesXPandsettingsfromanotherserverusin: Copies XP and settings from another server using this bot.
dashboard.Theexpectedjsonformatisthesameaswhenyoup: The expected .json format is the same as when you press "download all data" at the top of this
dashboard.Importsettingscooldowncurvelevelupmessag: Import settings (cooldown, curve, level up message, etc)
dashboard.Sinceyouaretransferringfromanotherserver: Since you are transferring from another server, reward roles and multipliers cannot be copied
dashboard.Someextrafancyorexperimentaloptions: Some extra fancy or experimental options.
dashboard.torunmoderatorcommandsegaddxporcleareven: to run moderator commands (e.g. /addxp or /clear) even if they don't have the Manage Server permission. Useful if you want to set custom slash command permissions for the server.
dashboard.ThehighestlevelthatmemberscanreachTheyca: The highest level that members can reach. They can still gain XP past this.
dashboard.TodisableXPgainafterreachingthemaxlevelu: To disable XP gain after reaching the max level, use a reward role with a 0x multiplier.
dashboard.Changestheembedcolorwhenusingrank: Changes the embed color when using /rank.
dashboard.Usesthemembersroleprofilecolorbydefault: Uses the member's role/profile color by default.
dashboard.Changestheembedcolorwhenusingtop: Changes the embed color when using /top.
